details.test: Task 1: When-to-test calculator plan saved and visible in saved items
Task 2: Compare two cheapest early detection tests under $20 and favorite best value
Task 3: Save exactly two recent medically reviewed false-negative-after-missed-period articles
Task 4: Post anonymous faint-positive question in Test Results category
Task 5: Create and finalize a 3-step testing reminder plan over next 7 days
Task 6: Symptom checker recommendation and open first suggested when-to-test guide

Task 8: Favorite highest-rated midstream and cheapest strip test under $10
Task 9: Find nearby store within 5 miles stocking an EarlySure test and view details
